rationale.ai-code-insecurity: Synthesizes evidence that 40–50% of AI-generated code contains vulnerabilities.
rationale.quality-debt: Reports low correctness, debugging overhead, instability, and potential technical debt.
rationale.rules-based-checks: Recommends mandatory security scanning and enhanced testing for AI-generated code.
rationale.org-governance: Argues adoption requires governance frameworks, monitoring, policies, training, and accountability.
rationale.problem-statement-anchor: Highlights a committee-salient 40–50% vulnerability rate across generated code.
rationale.survey-input: Provides adoption, acceptance, satisfaction, trust, and organizational implementation findings.
rationale.lit-review: Synthesizes academic, industry, and deployment studies published from 2020–2025.
